headline_state: Phone call lead goal repaired. All 6 account-default goals Active. Tracking pipeline fully verified.

funnel.verifiedNote: Tag pipeline verified working May 9 — limiter is reach, not tracking

trackingState.newestChange: May 11 — Phone call lead goal repaired

insights.headline: Funnel fix — single highest-leverage move
insights.body: Only ~3 of 62 paid sessions reach /free-estimate/ in 30 days. Route the active campaign's final URLs to /free-estimate/ directly or embed the CF7 form on the current LP. Until this changes, the form-conversion tag (now verified firing correctly) has no traffic to record against.

insights.headline: GTM Version 8 is live with the new GA4 generate_lead tag
insights.body: Published May 9, 2026. GA4 Key Events went from 0 to 5 in the 2 days since — the tag is producing real signal. Form-submit tracking pipeline verified end-to-end.

insights.headline: Phone call lead goal repaired May 11
insights.body: Was flagged 'Needs attention' — the GFN-based Click to call action was demoted from Primary to Secondary. Goal now reads Active across all 6 campaigns.

insights.headline: Apply 75+ recommended negative keywords
insights.body: Buckshot_NegativeKeywords_RECOMMENDED_BULK_UPLOAD.csv covers competitor brands, aggregators, Spanish, DIY, OOA geos. ~60–70% of wasted spend would be blocked.

insights.headline: Active campaign 'Bid setting limited' warning
insights.body: Leads – Roofing (PC) spending only 20% of $60/day cap. Lift bid / switch to Maximize Conversions after negatives + funnel work.

insights.headline: 5 of 6 campaigns paused
insights.body: 76% of 90-day spend ($3,408) ran through paused campaigns. Re-enable the highest-historical ad group inside Residential Roofing – Leads (PC) on the corrected LP first.
